question.text: Which option pricing model can be used for BOTH European and American options?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Binomial model is the most flexible — it can price both European and American options through iterative calculation. Black-Scholes is designed for European options only. **The Trap:** Black-Scholes can be MODIFIED for some American option features, but the standard form is European-only. **Cross-Exam Context:** Model capabilities are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The Binomial model is more accurate but computationally slower. Black-Scholes is fast but less flexible.
